should_trigger: This page is slow, can you check what's causing it? — slowness diagnosis
Getting timeout errors when importing large CSV files — timeouts
My LiveView is using a ton of memory — memory bloat
Need to optimize my user profile query before shipping — optimization before deploy
The notification GenServer is getting hammered under load — GenServer bottleneck
should_not_trigger: Run the N+1 check on my code — should use n1-check (specialized N+1 scanner)
Why doesn't my changeset validation work? — should use investigate (correctness bug)
Do a full project audit — should use audit (broad health check, not perf-focused)
